Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim For Minor
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor Sofina Chan
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Edward Hung, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Rina Cheung, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Daisy Chan present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded by Mandarin Interpreter Vance Chang.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $2,500.00
Attorney's Fees: $625.00 payable to Law Firm of Lawrence Wong, Wong & Associates, 413 Third Street, Oakland, CA 94607
Reimbursement for other expenses paid by petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $275.00
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $900

A net balance of $1,600.00 to be disbursed to Petitioner Rina Cheung, guardian ad litem in the amount of $1,600 by check to 139 Panama St., San Francisco, CA 94132. Disbursements are governed by Probate Code Section 3401-3402.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor's Compromise.

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Edward Hung, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Rina Cheung, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Sofina Chan present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded by Mandarin Interpreter Vance Chang.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $2,500.00
Attorney's Fees: $625.00 payable to Law Firm of Lawrence Wong, Wong & Associates, 413 Third Street, Oakland, CA 94607
Reimbursement for expenses paid by petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $275.00
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $900
A net balance of $1,600.00 to be disbursed to Petitioner Rina Cheung, guardian ad litem in the amount of $1,600 by check to 139 Panama St., San Francisco, CA 94132. Disbursements are governed by Probate Code Section 3401-3402.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor's Compromise.
